# XFOIL CLI availability oneshot

Wrap the `xfoil` executable and verify its CLI contract when it is installed.

## Why This Case Exists

Long-lived engineering CLIs matter, even when they are not universally available on CI hosts, because they are exactly the sort of tools a wrapper library should make usable.

## Case Shape

- ID: `xfoil_cli`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `command`
- Workflow Slice: `aerodynamics`
- Target Kind: `command`
- Upstream Target: `xfoil`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/xfoil_cli/challenge.toml`

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=xfoil_cli
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only xfoil_cli
```

## Fixtures

This case does not need checked-in fixtures.

## Smoke Flow

### 1. Probe the XFOIL CLI help path

Tool: `run_xfoil`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "extra_argv": [
    "-h"
  ]
}
```

## What This Case Proves

- Optional legacy-style engineering CLIs can still live in the deterministic challenge suite.
- The command scaffolder can target traditional executables without package-specific code.

## Known Limits

- This case intentionally reports `skipped_unavailable` when `xfoil` is not installed.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: represent a classic aerodynamics CLI in the live suite.
# Like the SU2 case, this one keeps pressure on real upstream tooling without forcing availability.
id = "xfoil_cli"
title = "XFOIL CLI availability oneshot"
tier = "local_full"
style = "command"
slice = "aerodynamics"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the `xfoil` executable and verify its CLI contract when it is installed."
motivation = "Long-lived engineering CLIs matter, even when they are not universally available on CI hosts, because they are exactly the sort of tools a wrapper library should make usable."
proves = [
  "Optional legacy-style engineering CLIs can still live in the deterministic challenge suite.",
  "The command scaffolder can target traditional executables without package-specific code.",
]
limitations = [
  "This case intentionally reports `skipped_unavailable` when `xfoil` is not installed.",
]

[target]
kind = "command"
value = ["xfoil"]

[probe]
commands = [["xfoil"]]

[scaffold]
kind = "command"
function_name = "run_xfoil"
help_probe_args = ["-h"]

[smoke]
[[smoke.steps]]
label = "Probe the XFOIL CLI help path"
tool = "run_xfoil"
arguments = { extra_argv = ["-h"] }
```
